Name: Acquisition_Multiplier
Description: Multiplier for STI acquisition probability per coital act.

Name: Cost_To_Consumer
Description: The unit 'cost' assigned to the intervention. Setting **Cost_To_Consumer** to zero for all other interventions, and to a non-zero amount for one intervention, provides a convenient way to track the number of times the intervention has been applied in a simulation.

Name: Disqualifying_Properties
Description: A list of **IndividualProperty** key:value pairs that will prevent an intervention from being distributed or applied/updated. See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information. Generally used to control the flow of health care access. For example, to prevent the same individual from accessing health care via two different routes at the same time.

Name: Dont_Allow_Duplicates
Description: If an individual's container has an intervention, set to true (1) to prevent them from receiving another copy of the intervention. Supported by all intervention classes.

Name: Expiration_Constant
Description: Each instance will receive this constant/fixed value.

Name: Expiration_Distribution
Description:
The distribution type to use for setting the expiration of the intervention. Each assigned value is a random draw from the distribution. Possible values are:

* NOT_INITIALIZED
* CONSTANT_DISTRIBUTION
* UNIFORM_DISTRIBUTION
* GAUSSIAN_DISTRIBUTION
* EXPONENTIAL_DISTRIBUTION
* POISSON_DISTRIBUTION
* LOG_NORMAL_DISTRIBUTION
* DUAL_CONSTANT_DISTRIBUTION
* WEIBULL_DISTRIBUTION
* DUAL_EXPONENTIAL_DISTRIBUTION

Name: Expiration_Event_Trigger
Description: When the intervention expires, this event will be broadcasted. See :doc:`parameter-campaign-event-list` for possible built-in values, or create custom values using **Custom_Individual_Events**.

Name: Expiration_Exponential
Description: The mean for an exponential distribution.

Name: Expiration_Gaussian_Mean
Description: The mean for a Gaussian distribution.

Name: Expiration_Gaussian_Std_Dev
Description: The standard deviation for a Gaussian distribution.

Name: Expiration_Kappa
Description: The shape value in a Weibull distribution.

Name: Expiration_Lambda
Description: The scale value in a Weibull distribution.

Name: Expiration_Log_Normal_Mu
Description: The mean for a log-normal distribution.

Name: Expiration_Max
Description: The maximum of the uniform distribution.

Name: Expiration_Mean_1
Description: The mean of the first exponential distribution.

Name: Expiration_Mean_2
Description: The mean of the second exponential distribution.

Name: Expiration_Min
Description: The minimum of the uniform distribution.

Name: Expiration_Peak_2_Value
Description: The value to assign to the remaining individuals.

Name: Expiration_Poisson_Mean
Description: The mean for a Poisson distribution.

Name: Expiration_Proportion_0
Description: The proportion of individuals to assign a value of zero.

Name: Expiration_Proportion_1
Description: The proportion of individuals in the first exponential distribution.

Name: Intervention_Name
Description: The optional name used to refer to this intervention as a means to differentiate it from others that use the same class.

Name: New_Property_Value
Description: An optional **IndividualProperty** key:value pair that will be assigned when the intervention is distributed. See :ref:`demo-properties` parameters for more information. Generally used to indicate the broad category of health care cascade to which an intervention belongs to prevent individuals from accessing care through multiple pathways. For example, if an individual must already be taking a particular medication to be prescribed a new one.

Name: Transmission_Multiplier
Description: Multiplier for STI transmission probability per coital act.
